description: The last garden built among the Suzhou gardens, incorporating the essence of various garden styles.

attraction_name: Pingjiang Road Historical and Cultural District
description: The most well-preserved ancient street district in Suzhou, featuring Ming and Qing dynasty buildings along the river, with enchanting night views.
A classical garden within Tongli Ancient Town, famous for the Kunqu opera 'The Pearl Tower.'
A literary and artistic district in Suzhou, filled with cafes, bookstores, and galleries, exuding a strong cultural atmosphere.
The core garden of Tongli Ancient Town, a UNESCO World Heritage Site and a representative work of late Jiangnan garden design.
A perfect blend of modern architecture designed by I. M. Pei and classical gardens, showcasing the essence of Jiangnan culture.
The iconic scenery of Tongli Ancient Town, featuring three stone bridges connected together, symbolizing good fortune and prosperity.
A thousand-year-old ancient street with picturesque night views, abundant traditional snacks, and an experience of Suzhou's classical nightlife.
One of China's Four Famous Gardens, an outstanding example of Ming dynasty garden art, with clear ponds and intricately arranged pavilions and towers.
